action.reasoning: Observation: The eval failed in iter 17 because I passed `scene_codes` (batch dimension) instead of `scene_codes[0]` to `model.renderer`, which expects the unbatched triplane. The original error in iter 16 (65535 vs 65536) was likely due to NaNs in ray generation when elevation is exactly 90 or -90, which causes rays to be dropped during ray-bbox intersection. Analysis: I will revert `scene_codes` to `scene_codes[0]` in `predict.py` while keeping the parallel vector fix for elevation=90. I will also run a script `find_crash.py` to verify this logic on the training set and submit an eval to finally get the true baseline LPIPS.
